title: 英検準2級 2026年度 第1回 リスニング

source.segmentation: ffmpeg silencedetectで約10秒の解答無音を検出し、各設問ごとのMP3クリップを生成。第1部の選択肢は放送されるため台本から取得。

choices: Well, you should be more careful.

lessons.question: What is one thing we learn about apples?
choices: The United States grows the biggest apples.
They can help our brains work better.
They were first grown in the United States.
People in most countries do not eat apples.
lessons.script:
★Eating apples is very healthy. Some scientists even say that eating apples can make our brains work
better. Apples grow in many countries, and there are many kinds. In the United States, there are over
2,500 kinds of apples. People in other countries eat apples, too. They are a useful fruit to have in our
diets.
☆☆
tips: 第3部は1文目で場面、最後の文で結論が出やすい。冒頭と末尾を特に丁寧に聞く。

park in the paid parking area on Main Street. Also, please enjoy the art in the beautiful park near the
museum after your visit.
☆☆

lessons.question: What is one thing we learn about Bengal tigers?
choices: Their orange fur helps animals see them.
They are the rarest kind of tiger.
lessons.script:
☆Bengal tigers are the most common kind of wild tiger, and are originally from India. Because of this,
they are also called Indian tigers. Although Bengal tigers are known for their orange fur, their bright
colors and black stripes actually help them to hide from other animals. They may look similar, but no
two tigers have the same exact pattern of stripes.
☆☆
tips: 第3部は1文目で場面、最後の文で結論が出やすい。冒頭と末尾を特に丁寧に聞く。

lessons.question: How did Emma solve her problem?
choices: By walking her dog after dark.
By getting up early every morning.
lessons.script:
☆Emma has a dog, and her dog was getting fat. Emma's mother told Emma to make sure her dog got
more exercise. At first, Emma tried taking her dog to the park after school, but it often got dark before
they had a chance to play. Now, Emma gets up early and takes her dog for a walk every morning.
☆☆

choices: It is not done in skiing areas.
It is more than one hundred years old.
It uses equipment that is not the same as skiing.
lessons.script:
★Snowboarding is similar to skiing. Snowboarders ride on a board down mountains covered with
snow. The sport became popular in the United States in the 1980s and later spread to other countries.
Although snowboarding is often done in the same area as skiing, the equipment used is very different.
☆☆
